zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne des Roches於大約1195年出生在法國安喬時，她的父親Guillaume des ROCHES42歲，母親Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé17歲。她於1212年之前與Amaury I de CRAON結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1222年被列為suo jure seneschal of anjou。她去世於1238年9月28日在法國享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne des Roches于大约1195年出生在法国安喬时，她的父亲Guillaume des ROCHES42岁，母亲Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé17岁。她于1212年之前与Amaury I de CRAON结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1222年被列为suo jure seneschal of anjou。她去世于1238年9月28日在法国享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Alsace and Lorraine): from a shortened form of the German personal name   Debus  .

variants.name: Debus
meanings: German: from a personal name, a vernacular short form of Matthäus (see Matthew ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine); compare Debs .
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of various places called Bus (from a regional form of bois ‘wood’) in Eure, Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Roches
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from Les Roches in Seine-Maritime (Normandy). In 1297 John de Roches held the manor of (East) Winterslow in Wilts (later known as Roche Court). Any of the following post-medieval bearers may alternatively belong under (2).  See also  Roche  .
2 English: variant of Roche with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Roche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne des Roches was born about 1195, in Anjou, France, her father, Guillaume des ROCHES, was 42 and her mother, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, was 17. She married Amaury I de CRAON before 1212. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. In 1222, at the age of 28, her occupation is listed as suo jure seneschal of anjou. She died on 28 September 1238, in France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne des Roches est née environ 1195, à Anjou, France, son père, Guillaume des ROCHES, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Amaury I de CRAON avant 1212. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. En 1222, à l’âge de 28 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est suo jure seneschal of anjou. Elle est décédée le 28 septembre 1238, à France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

Sie hat vor 1212 Amaury I de CRAON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1222, als sie 28 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als suo jure seneschal of anjou aufgeführt. Sie starb am 28. September 1238 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne des Roches è nata il circa 1195 nel Anjou, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume des ROCHES, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Amaury I de CRAON prima del 1212. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Nel 1222, all'età di 28 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come suo jure seneschal of anjou. Morì il 28 settembre 1238, nel Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne des Roches(이)가 대략 1195년 프랑스 앤조우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume des ROCHES(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1212년 이전 Amaury I de CRAON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1222년, 28세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 suo jure seneschal of anjou이었다. 그녀는 1238년 9월 28일 프랑스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne des Roches nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Anjou, França, seu pai, Guillaume des ROCHES, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Amaury I de CRAON antes 1212. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Em 1222, com 28 anos, sua profissão aparece como suo jure seneschal of anjou. Ela faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1238, em França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne des Roches родилась около 1195 г. в местности анджоу, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume des ROCHES было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amaury I de CRAON перед 1212 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1222 году, в возрасте 28 лет,  она работала по профессии suo jure seneschal of anjou. Она умерла 28 сентября 1238 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne des Roches nació aproximadamente 1195, en Anjou, Francia, su papá, Guillaume des ROCHES, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Amaury I de CRAON antes de 1212. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. En 1222, a la edad de 28 años, su ocupación registrada era suo jure seneschal of anjou. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1238, en Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
